$comment: Tasks for scripts/lifeos-builder-overnight.mjs — must stay aligned with LIFEOS_DASHBOARD_OVERNIGHT_QUEUE.md. Inherit the queue default model unless a task explicitly requires force_model:true.

tasks.task: Produce a gap audit only. The files[] payloads injected below are authoritative — they prove LIFEOS_DASHBOARD_BUILDER_BRIEF.md and LIFEOS_DASHBOARD_OVERNIGHT_QUEUE.md exist on the server. NEVER claim ENOENT/missing SSOT docs. Compare lifeos-dashboard.html and lifeos-app.html against the brief (sidebar, bottom tabs, AI rail direction, light/dark intent, mobile vs desktop). List concrete gaps. Do not rewrite production HTML.
tasks.spec: Markdown only. Sections: Summary, Gaps vs brief, Recommended next queued builds, Open questions if any. If injected file contents contradict prior assumptions, trust injected bodies first. Reference mockup filenames from the brief. End with ---METADATA--- JSON block.
tasks.commit_message: [system-build] Dashboard shell gap audit (supervised overnight queue)

tasks.task: Create a new shared CSS token file for LifeOS dashboard shell: semantic color/spacing/radius variables for both light and dark. Use data-theme or .theme-light / .theme-dark on html or body matching patterns already used in lifeos-dashboard.html if present; if unclear, use [data-theme="light"] and [data-theme="dark"] on :root-compatible selectors. Do not break existing overlay pages — this file should be additive.
tasks.spec: Pure CSS file. Include comment header pointing to LIFEOS_DASHBOARD_BUILDER_BRIEF.md. Minimum: --dash-bg, --dash-surface, --dash-text, --dash-muted, --dash-accent, --dash-border, --dash-radius-lg, --dash-space-unit for both themes. End file with newline. No external imports. ---METADATA--- JSON optional for .css — if METADATA required by builder, add HTML comment block at end.
tasks.notes: New small file — easier to validate than rewriting 30k dashboard HTML.

tasks.task: Wire public/shared/lifeos-dashboard-tokens.css into lifeos-dashboard.html with a single link tag in head (correct relative path from /overlay/). Preserve all existing behavior. Apply theme class or data-attribute to html/body if needed for tokens — minimal diff. Ensure both light and dark paths remain reachable per existing dashboard JS/theme logic.
tasks.spec: Minimal HTML edits only. Preserve structure. Full valid HTML document. Do not remove existing scripts. End with ---METADATA--- JSON per builder contract.
tasks.commit_message: [system-build] Wire dashboard CSS tokens into lifeos-dashboard (overnight queue)
tasks.notes: Runs after dashboard-theme-foundation so tokens file exists.

tasks.task: Document how scripts/builder-smoke/dashboard-layout-utils.mjs (clampMobileWidgetCount, resolveThemeMode, pickDashboardDensity) should integrate into the dashboard shell without implementing the full AI rail yet. Include concrete DOM hook suggestions and SSR/client boundaries if any.
tasks.spec: Markdown. Short sections. Reference the mockup PNG for density study. ---METADATA--- JSON at end.
tasks.notes: Doc-only; safe parallel to risky UI.

tasks.task: Write a technical contract (not full implementation) for the persistent AI rail: dock top/bottom, collapsed one-line strip, expanded transcript, voice/text parity, read-aloud — and how it relates to existing Lumin/chat entry points. Explicitly say what must not break.
tasks.spec: Markdown with Contract, Non-goals, Phases, and Open questions. ---METADATA--- JSON at end.
tasks.notes: Spec before code — reduces overnight HTML thrash.

tasks.task: Create CSS ONLY for the dashboard AI rail: collapsed one-line strip, expanded transcript panel, dock-top and dock-bottom variants, safe-area insets for notched/mobile, respects token variables from lifeos-dashboard-tokens.css and [data-theme] if present on html/body. No JavaScript.
tasks.spec: Pure CSS file. Leading comment cites DASHBOARD_AI_RAIL_CONTRACT.md. Class names prefixed lifeos-ai-rail-*. No external @import except optional reference only (prefer none). End with newline.
tasks.commit_message: [system-build] Dashboard AI rail shared CSS (overnight queue split)
tasks.notes: Small target — runs before JS + HTML wire.

tasks.task: IIFE ES module-compatible script that mounts AI rail UX into #lifeos-ai-rail-root (create if absent): collapsed/expanded toggle, dock position persisted in sessionStorage keys lifeos-ai-rail:*, listens for theme attribute changes if exposed, does not duplicate full chat logic — stubs open existing Lumin/chat entrypoints or focus chat input hook if present. Respect reduced-motion.
tasks.spec: Plain browser JS. No npm imports. ESLint-neutral. export default none; attach window.LifeOSDashboardAiRail = { mount } if reasonable. Leading comment cites contract file.
tasks.commit_message: [system-build] Dashboard AI rail client script (overnight queue split)
tasks.notes: After CSS artifact exists server-side via prior task/commit mirror.

tasks.task: Wire lifeos-dashboard-ai-rail.css and lifeos-dashboard-ai-rail.js into lifeos-dashboard.html (correct relative URLs from /overlay/). Add shell element with id="lifeos-ai-rail-root" where the persistent rail should live per contract. Preserve all behavior and scripts. Minimal semantic diff besides rail hookup.
tasks.spec: Full valid HTML document. End with ---METADATA--- JSON per builder contract.
tasks.commit_message: [system-build] Wire dashboard AI rail assets into lifeos-dashboard (overnight queue)
tasks.notes: Uses supervisor max_output_tokens for large-overlay regen safety.

tasks.task: Write local/state contract only: widget visibility, order (array of ids), density mode, pinned widgets — storage keys (localStorage vs server later), versioning, migration on schema bump, SSR/client boundaries. Non-goals: full persistence API.
tasks.spec: Markdown sections: Goals, Keys & shapes, Density enum, Risks. ---METADATA--- JSON tail.
tasks.notes: Doc-only queue item aligned with LIFEOS_DASHBOARD_OVERNIGHT_QUEUE customization-state.

tasks.task: Specification only: compact / balanced / expanded density for dashboard cards per brief, mapping to CSS variables and DOM data attributes, mobile constraints, and how it intersects with customization state doc. No HTML rewrite.
tasks.spec: Markdown: modes, token mapping, rollout order. ---METADATA--- JSON at end.
tasks.notes: Keeps overnight runner advancing after wave-1 queue drained.

tasks.task: Specification for Today category: MITs, schedule, alerts, quick add, Lumin entry — layout blocks and API assumptions only; reference existing dashboard sections by id/class if visible in injected HTML.
tasks.notes: May run after density spec exists for cross-links; builder tolerates missing optional file in files[] if empty — prefer listing only existing files; DASHBOARD_WIDGET_DENSITY_SPEC may not exist on first run.

tasks.task: Specification for Health / Family / Purpose category stubs: placeholder layout, navigation hooks, what stays shell vs domain-owned. No full domain implementation.
tasks.commit_message: [system-build] Category stubs spec Health Family Purpose (overnight wave 2)
tasks.notes: Doc-only; aligns with overnight queue item 9.

tasks.task: Specification only: dashboard shell accessibility (focus traps, landmarks, keyboard paths, contrast, prefers-reduced-motion). Reference WCAG-oriented language; no HTML rewrite.
tasks.notes: Doc-only queue so cursor past 12 resumes.

tasks.task: Specification for skeletons, shimmer rules, optimistic UI risks, empty states copy tone per brief. Implementation deferred.
tasks.commit_message: [system-build] Loading and empty-state spec for dashboard (overnight wave 3)
tasks.notes: Pairs with polish queue markdown item 10.
